name: 双持贝瑞塔 | 钴蓝石英
nameZh: 双持贝瑞塔 | 钴蓝石英
descriptionEn: Firing two large-mag Berettas at once will lower accuracy and increase load times. On the bright side, you'll get to fire two large-mag Berettas at once. It has been painted with metallic paint and uses a crystallizing mask to create a pattern. Everyone wants to make an impact
descriptionZh: 两把具有大弹匣的贝瑞塔同时开火会降低精准度，并增加换弹时间。不过你得往好处想，这不，别人只有一把枪，而你可以同时用两把贝瑞塔射个痛快。 枪身涂有金属质感喷漆并使用结晶模具压印图案。 谁都想做弄潮儿
